_doc: Lane CLASS proofs for preflight Check 65.
Each entry asserts that a complete dispatch -> train -> archive -> auth_eval
cycle has been demonstrated for that lane class. Proofs land via:
(a) production deploy that produced a contest-CUDA score,
Every numeric score MUST carry a lane tag per CLAUDE.md non-negotiable
production landings (Lane G v3, Lane A, Lane M-V2, Lane F-V2, Lane B).
2026-04-29 reinit: remaining classes are backfilled as plumbing-only
canonical-local-smoke proofs when no class-specific score exists yet.

renderer-optimized.notes: Lane A landed 1.15 -- baseline beat by Lane G v3 0.10 later same day.

kl-distill.notes: Lane G v3 verified 1.05 -- KL weight 0.002 + pose TTO retry on Lane A anchor.

pose-tto.notes: Pose TTO retry from Lane A anchor produces the 1.15 baseline.

fp4-qat.notes: Lane F-V2 1.79 -- regression vs Lane A 1.15 by 0.64 (FP4 architectural cost on FastViT/YUV6); recorded as proof of pipeline completeness.

archive-codec.notes: Plumbing-only Check 65 backfill from canonical_local_auth_eval_smoke using Lane G v3 fixture archive sha256 9b20bdfca246d8e32cc19da966c84cdae7e34f6b247161d107ec43cb9ef6870b. This proves extract/config/inflate dispatch, not archive-codec score.

calibrated-pe.notes: Plumbing-only Check 65 backfill from canonical local smoke; class-specific training/auth evidence still required before promotion.

entropy-archive.notes: Plumbing-only Check 65 backfill from canonical local smoke; no entropy-archive score claim.

fp8-quant.notes: Plumbing-only Check 65 backfill from canonical local smoke; FP8 class remains unpromoted until contest-CUDA auth evidence exists.

halfframe-mask.notes: Plumbing-only Check 65 backfill from canonical local smoke. Existing lane_h_crf56 auth scored 3.20 and is negative evidence, not a proof of improvement.

hessian-bit-allocator.notes: Plumbing-only Check 65 backfill from canonical local smoke. 2026-04-29 Modal attempt hit a CUDA device-side assert during Hessian profiling; fix required before relaunch.

lagrangian-rate-distortion.notes: Plumbing-only Check 65 backfill from canonical local smoke; no class-specific score claim.

mae-pretrain.notes: Plumbing-only Check 65 backfill from canonical local smoke. 2026-04-29 Modal attempt failed before training on missing pydantic in the remote environment.

self-compress.notes: Plumbing-only Check 65 backfill from canonical local smoke; class still needs a completed train/archive/auth proof.

sweep-orchestrator.notes: Plumbing-only Check 65 backfill from canonical local smoke; sweep orchestration is not itself a score claim.

uncategorized.notes: Plumbing-only Check 65 backfill for currently uncategorized lane scripts. Prefer adding explicit class keywords before making this strict.

uniward-distortion.notes: Plumbing-only Check 65 backfill from canonical local smoke. 2026-04-29 Modal attempt failed anchor checks because baseline_dilated_h64_0_90 artifacts were not present in the remote path.
